evidence_label: FDA regulatory benchmark update, not treatment advice

sources.source_role: FDA product page lists STN 125787 for patients aged 2 years and older with transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia and SCD; it also preserves STN 125785 for the earlier 12 years and older indication.

sources.source_label: FDA July 1 2026 supplemental approval press announcement
sources.source_role: FDA states the supplemental approval covers Casgevy for patients aged 2 years and older with either SCD with recurrent VOCs or TDT, and describes pediatric TDT trial and extrapolation context.
Clinical guideline anchor for gene addition and gene editing context, including autologous HSPC collection, conditioning, infusion, follow-up, cost, and long-term surveillance.

benchmark_interpretation.claim: The public FDA regulatory benchmark for Casgevy now includes patients aged 2 years and older with TDT under STN 125787.
The update does not establish Indonesia availability, reimbursement, center access, private patient suitability, or a referral path.
The branch-review blocker remains the private six-domain packet, not the existence of an FDA-approved gene-editing benchmark.

decision_rule: Record the July 2026 FDA age-expansion as a current benchmark and source-map update only. Do not use it to change Case-001 branch state without private packet review by qualified clinical owners.
